CENTRAL BOARD OF DIRECT TAXES New Delhi, the 30th December, 1978 (INCOME-TAX) S,O. 1441.—-In exercise of the powers conferred by sub- action (1) of Section 121 of the Income-tax Act, 1961 (43 rf 1961), the Centra] Board of Direct Taxes hereby makes the 'ollowing amendments to its Notification No. 679 (F No 187/2/74-mAI) dated 20-7-1974 as amended from time to line. After the last entry under Column 3 against SI. No. 11 the blowing shall be added. 7. Survey Circle, Kanpur. [No. 2628 <F. No. 187/78-IT(Al)] M. Control and Appeal) Rules, 1978, (1) in rale 2, the following shall be added, name'y ;— (1) 'Joint Director' means the Joint Director of the Export Inspection Council ; f2) for sub-rule (4) of rule 12 the following sub-ru'e shall be substituted, namely :— "(4) Tf the disciplinary authority having reffai-d to its findings on all or any of the article? of charge and on the basis of the evidence aduced during the Inquiry is of the opinion that any of the nena'ti's specified in clauses (v) to (ix) of rule 8 should be imposed on the Council employee, it shall make nn order imposing such penalty and it shall not be necessary to give the Council emp'oyee anv opportunity of making representation on th* penalty proposed to be imposed." fF. Jr. Director (Office of the Chief Controller of Import) & Export*) ORDER New Delhi, the 26th March, 1979 S.O. 1444.—M|s. The Metal Box Company of India Ltd. Allahabad Bank Building , 17 Parliament Street, New Delhi-110001 were granted Tmport licence No. P/D/2206927/ C/XX/62/H/43-44/Paper dated 1-2-77 for import of Raw materials and Components as per list attached to its valuted in Rs. 25,700 from G.C.A. 2. They have requested for issue of duplicate Customs Purposes copy of the above said licence on the ground that the original Customs copy has been lost/misplaced without hav- ing been registered with any Customs authority. It has been further reported by the licensee that the licence WHS not utilised at all. 3. In support of the contention, the applicant have filed an Affidavit. The undersigned is satisfied that the ordinal Cus- toms Purposes copy of Imports licence No. P/D/2206927 dt. 1-2-77 has been lost or misplaced ,ind hence directs that a duplicate Customs Purposes copy of the licence should he jssued to the applicant. The original Customs Purposes copy is hereby cancelled. 4. The duplicate Customs Purposes copy of the licence is befng issued separately. [F. No. Paper/50/1 /76-77/RM-I1] C. S. ARYA, Dy.
